column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty catching a pink petal in her hands" | TEXT="春風ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty dancing softly surrounded by petals" | TEXT="舞い散る花びら" P3: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty holding her hat/hair in the wind" | TEXT="風が強い！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty looking up at a petal storm happily" | TEXT="桜吹雪です" P5: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty picking a petal out of her hair" | TEXT="髪についてた" P6: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty pointing up at the sky" | TEXT="飛んでいく" P7: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty closing eyes feeling the breeze" | TEXT="気持ちいい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty spinning playfully in the petals" | TEXT="わぁーっ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty carrying blowing petals playfully" | TEXT="綺麗"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty waving cheerfully in a light wind" | TEXT="おはよう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty bowing politely" | TEXT="ありがとうございます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty nodding with a very bright smile" | TEXT="はい！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty shaking head kindly closing eyes" | TEXT="違うよ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty looking politely apologetic" | TEXT="ごめんなさい" P6: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty making an OK sign proudly" | TEXT="OK" P7: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty putting hands together begging cutely" | TEXT="お願い" P8: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty offering her palm softly" | TEXT="どうぞ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty tilting her head curiously" | TEXT="どうしたの？"
